title: ARA and ANVCA Congratulate Secretary Haaland on her Groundbreaking Confirmation

title: Mary Jane Fate: Celebrating an Alaska Native leader
summary: By Jennifer Adams, MBA, Rural Center Director Mary Jane Fate was Koyukon Athabascan from Rampart, Alaska who left a lasting impression on women in Alaska, especially Alaska Native women. Fate was one of the original Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act lobbyists and her work helped secure the 40 million acres of land and $1 billion conveyed to...
